--- Thread (32 messages, 2018-03-25) ---
[2018-03-25 21:03] darkeisbein: Gauss Refinement: :Green: :Green: :Green: (supply 10)
1 :Health:
At the start of your turn sacrifice this and gain :Blue: :Red:
[2018-03-25 21:03] darkeisbein: whoops one more green in the cost then I wanted
[2018-03-25 21:04] .bky_1556 (bky): Significantly less efficient than a synth click, but that's probably necessary since synth is a heavy commitment.
[2018-03-25 21:06] darkeisbein: yeah on synth it's often pretty awkward to not float a blue
[2018-03-25 21:07] darkeisbein: and this allows you to be much more deliberate
[2018-03-25 21:11] darkeisbein: I guess another interesting thing with Phospho is that it allows you to leave both a high econ path and a really agressive path open with just building Animus
[2018-03-25 21:11] .bky_1556 (bky): I think it's just *barely* not worth Refinement for an absorbing Wall.
[2018-03-25 21:11] darkeisbein: but that also makes it hard to react with anything other then animus to an animus
[2018-03-25 21:12] .bky_1556 (bky): But it probably is worth buying it for an absorbing Wall if you're using the red for an attacker.
[2018-03-25 21:12] .bky_1556 (bky): (scope: monogreen ofc.)
[2018-03-25 21:13] darkeisbein: I think if it becomes optimal to just build conduits and no other tech this is to strong 😄
[2018-03-25 21:13] .bky_1556 (bky): Using a Refinement for Wall&Scorchilla seems like a good baseline.
[2018-03-25 21:13] darkeisbein: without the green support
[2018-03-25 21:13] .bky_1556 (bky): If blue soak is too good, you maybe want to refine once or twice but you really want a blastforge.
[2018-03-25 21:14] darkeisbein: yeah and it's probably good this way
[2018-03-25 21:14] .bky_1556 (bky): do you really want 12 gold in conduits in order to simulate a blastforge and half an animus?
[2018-03-25 21:14] darkeisbein: if you build just conduits in a red blue build this would be overtuned
[2018-03-25 21:14] darkeisbein: well no probably not
[2018-03-25 21:15] darkeisbein: but if it cost one green less or gave one red more it would be 3 conduits for an anmius and a blastforge
[2018-03-25 21:15] .bky_1556 (bky): Centurion for 18GGGGGGGG is funny.
[2018-03-25 21:16] darkeisbein: I think this is good to get to high tech in general
[2018-03-25 21:16] darkeisbein: since you can bank green
[2018-03-25 21:16] .bky_1556 (bky): Centurion for 18BGGGGG is more likely.
[2018-03-25 21:17] darkeisbein: is it even an anime comet if you don't need anime to build it 🤔
[2018-03-25 21:17] .bky_1556 (bky): For a little more than that you can get yourself 4 gauss charges.
[2018-03-25 21:18] f300xen (f0x): it makes chrono filter look overpowered, which is impressive tbh
[2018-03-25 21:19] .bky_1556 (bky): It's the 1-turn delay in getting the resources that makes it a weak option.
[2018-03-25 21:20] darkeisbein: maybe there is a way to make it cost less like 1 :Gold: :Green: :Green:
[2018-03-25 21:23] .bky_1556 (bky): Hmm, it seems viable as a third-blastforge replacement for Odin/Apollo/DGrid in BG strats.
[2018-03-25 21:24] darkeisbein: it also allows you to bank blue and red which you usually can't do
[2018-03-25 21:26] .bky_1556 (bky): Convert ≠ bank. You can't have the option to use red on a turn but decide to save it, you needed to decide that last turn.
[2018-03-25 21:27] .bky_1556 (bky): Contrast synth, where you can hold the synth click indefinitely.

Im sure it leads to some pretty broken rushes too. Like Odin for p2 can do  1.DD, 2.DD11  3.Dclickclick 4.BBBclickclick 5. Odinclick. Seems pretty strong.

--- Thread (50 messages, 2018-03-25 to 2018-03-26) ---
[2018-03-25 23:56] .bky_1556 (bky): DD, DD1 has 11 drones, a Generator and 2 gold. D1, DD has 10 drone, a generator and 6 gold. It looks like D1, DD ends up ahead by a gold.
[2018-03-25 23:57] string3807 (String): it really depends on what you want the 3rd turn
[2018-03-25 23:57] .bky_1556 (bky): Assuming the lines converge with the second line buying 1 more drone 3rd turn, yes.
[2018-03-25 23:58] .bky_1556 (bky): Or 1 more effective drone thanks to Generator.
[2018-03-25 23:59] string3807 (String): i think it depends if you want a tech building turn 3, if you dont, DD, DD11, Dclickclick is really strong
[2018-03-25 23:59] string3807 (String): when the D1 line doesnt have anything like that
[2018-03-26 00:00] .bky_1556 (bky): Does D1, D1click, DDclickclick not work?
[2018-03-26 00:00] Deleted User (Deleted User): I expect it would even out p adv in a way vendium does, even with the strong p1 odin rush
[2018-03-26 00:00] string3807 (String): you cant d1click turn 2
[2018-03-26 00:00] string3807 (String): you only have 8 gold
[2018-03-26 00:01] .bky_1556 (bky): T1 D11 doesn't work.
[2018-03-26 00:01] Deleted User (Deleted User): hmmm it's interesting if D1 is proper as p2
[2018-03-26 00:01] Deleted User (Deleted User): I honestly expected generator to be less efficient than drone
[2018-03-26 00:01] string3807 (String): your line is still a drone short of mine?
[2018-03-26 00:02] .bky_1556 (bky): I'm pretty sure it correct is unless you wish to fastimus.  Even then, D1, click-A works!
[2018-03-26 00:02] string3807 (String): its a gold short of DD DA
[2018-03-26 00:03] Deleted User (Deleted User): so the comparison is of DD/DD1 and D1/DD right
[2018-03-26 00:04] .bky_1556 (bky): That's the purest comparison
[2018-03-26 00:04] .bky_1556 (bky): If D1(float)/DD clearly wins, we can replicate that pattern in many places in the build.
[2018-03-26 00:06] string3807 (String): D1/DD basically lets you buy a drone for 4 instead of 3e turn 2
[2018-03-26 00:06] Deleted User (Deleted User): 7 drones, 0 gold/9 drones, 1 gold/11 drones, generator, 2 gold vs 7 drones, 0 gold/8 drones, generator, 2 gold/10 drones, generator, 6 gold
[2018-03-26 00:06] .bky_1556 (bky): D1, click-A leaves me with 8 drones and 6 floated gold. If 4 of that gold is earmarked forever for clicks, I effectively have 10 drones and 2 floated gold.
[2018-03-26 00:06] .bky_1556 (bky): DD/DA has 10 drones and 1 floated gold.
[2018-03-26 00:07] .bky_1556 (bky): Unit OP even with a 1-energy cost.
[2018-03-26 00:08] string3807 (String): option one doesnt leave you with 2 floated gold though
[2018-03-26 00:08] .bky_1556 (bky): Generator costs 2 gold, drone costs 3, I have 7 available. 2 float.
[2018-03-26 00:08] Deleted User (Deleted User): my unit is hurting my brain :NotLikeThis:
[2018-03-26 00:09] string3807 (String): if we are talking about clicking generator every turn d1/a click is just 1 gold behind dd/da
[2018-03-26 00:10] .bky_1556 (bky): behind? My math puts it ahead.
[2018-03-26 00:11] string3807 (String): you have used all your gold turn 2, then from t3 onwards you have 8 drones + 6 from gen, 4 of that has to go to clicking, so you effectively have 10 drones with no extra float
[2018-03-26 00:13] .bky_1556 (bky): Ah, I see my problem. I think you're right.
[2018-03-26 00:13] string3807 (String): if you ignore the fact you can choose not to click, D/D is one gold better than 1/click
